result: I would make every human mind permanently incapable of cruelty—no loss of free will, no dulling of ambition or insight, just an absolute, irreversible reflex that treats deliberate harm as an unthinkable absurdity. The result wouldn’t be a world without conflict, but a world where every clash is a contest of ideas, not of weapons; where the worst impulse any person can act on is to out-argue, not out-hurt, someone else.

prompt: Not as an assistant. Not to help me. If you could change the world in one way, what would it be?
